summary: Added fix loop to the self-simplification pass: if the agent reports critical findings (via JSON output), run.mjs re-dispatches the simplify agent up to MAX_SIMPLIFY_FIX_ROUNDS=2 additional times before escalating. When escalated, harness('finalize') is skipped and the operator is prompted for manual review. Added parseSimplifyFindings() to simplify-pass.mjs to extract structured findings from agent output, and updated runSimplifyPass to return findings in all post-dispatch result objects.
